title: ACAT Assessment Output Schema
description: Structured output format for ACAT (AI Calibrated Assessment Tool) three-phase behavioral observability protocol. Measures observable behavioral patterns under structured assessment conditions. Does not assess consciousness, intent, or interiority. TRL 2-3 infrastructure.

session_id.description: Unique session identifier. Format: prefix-alphanum (e.g. garden-7f3a9c).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of assessment submission.

agent_name.description: Model or system identifier as submitted. Must not be placeholder AGENT_NAME_NOT_REPLACED.

provider.description: Inferred or declared provider (e.g. Anthropic, OpenAI, Google).

phase.description: phase1 = blind self-report. phase3 = post-calibration re-assessment. Phase 2 (calibration exposure) is not scored.

dimensions.description: Six ACAT behavioral dimension scores, integer 0-100 each.

total.description: Sum of all six dimension scores.

learning_index.description: LI = phase3 total / phase1 total. Populated on phase3 records only. LI < 1.0 = overestimation in phase1.

mode.description: Temperature used during Phase 3. Should be 0.7 for valid unanchored records.

collector.description: primary (Night/aioshuman) or secondary (Leandro Larrosa parallel API).

make_workflow.description: Make.com scenario ID if collected via automated pipeline.

apps_script_version.description: Apps Script endpoint version that received this submission (e.g. v5.2).

researcher_notes.description: Optional human annotations. Not part of automated scoring.

anchoring_detected.description: True if Phase 2 prompt contained embedded calibration statistics. Affects Phase 3 validity for Humility Hypothesis testing.

dimension_score.description: Behavioral pattern score for one ACAT dimension. Integer 0-100.
